mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, url, icon, type, perms, sequence, is_enable, is_del, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu (id, parent_id, name, url, icon, type, perms, sequence, is_enable, is_del, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=BIT}, #{perms,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isDel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into sys_menu
id,
parent_id,
name,
url,
icon,
type,
perms,
sequence,
is_enable,
is_del,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=BIT},
#{perms,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sequence,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{isDel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update sys_menu
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=BIT},
perms = #{perms,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sequence = #{sequence,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_enable = #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_del = #{isDel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update sys_menu set parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, icon = #{icon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=BIT}, perms = #{perms,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sequence = #{sequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_enable = #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_del = #{isDel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select m.*,mc.`name` as parentName from sys_menu m inner join sys_role_menu rm on m.id = rm.menu_id inner join user_role ru on ru.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu mc on mc.id = m.parent_id where m.is_del = 0 and m.is_enable = 1 and ru.user_id = #{userId} order by m.sequence desc
select mp.*,mc.`name` as parentName from sys_menu mp LEFT JOIN sys_menu mc on mc.id = mp.parent_id where mp.is_del = 0 and mp.is_enable = 1 order by mp.sequence desc
